description: You are a game audio designer creating a 'Time Reversal' magic spell effect. Using the audio file at /home/ga/Audio/samples/magic_strike.wav, create a composite effect on a track named 'Spell FX' in Ardour. The effect must consist of a reversed version of the strike (with a 1-second fade-in at the start) followed immediately by the original forward strike, aligned end-to-end. Export the final stereo result to /home/ga/Audio/export/time_spell.wav.
